ddls:
CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "question_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question tag */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_tag_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each question tag
ID of the question the tag belongs to
